localizations.title: Lastman
localizations.hiddenObject_1: Take a close look at the bag belonging to Marianne, Adrian's mother.
localizations.hint_0_first: Adrian is now extrasensory. He is thus able to identify the nature of the energies of an invocation.
localizations.hint_0: Bring Adrian's extrasensory gaze to Gregorio's invocation to identify, thanks to the book, which school it belongs to. You will then be able to counter it with the right invocation.
localizations.hint_1: Take a close look at the bag belonging to Marianne, Adrian's mother.
localizations.hint_3: These pastries will make Adrian very happy.
localizations.hint_7: Adrian now remembers how his combat score evolved during his last confrontation with Gregorio. It starts at 10, goes to 8, then 3, etc.
localizations.hint_10: Elorna is very kind to Adrian; she could undoubtedly help him in his quest.
localizations.hint_12: This medallion is said to be a relic inherited from the founders of the first fighting schools. It is the symbol of ancestral knowledge. There is no question of giving it to anyone.
localizations.hint_18_first: Elorna shows you the way to follow in the Valley of the Kings.
localizations.hint_18: The route indicated by Elorna draws a number.
localizations.hint_20: Gregorio is very strong. Adrian will first have to train before daring to confront him.
localizations.hint_42: After raising his guard (machine 45), Adrian will be able to perform on Elorna the sequence taught to him by Master Jansen.
localizations.hint_56: It seems that something can be inserted into the cover of this book.
localizations.hint_58: It's time for Adrian to prove himself by facing a formidable opponent.
localizations.hint_63: Pay attention to the 4 'sounds' of combat, as well as their order.
localizations.hint_68: The river beats the hearth, the hearth beats the oak, the oak beats the wind, the wind beats the heavens, the heavens beat the river.
localizations.hint_72: Adrian must open his 3rd eye to be able to read Gregorio's invocation and counter it.
localizations.hint_78_first: The 3rd eye is between the 2 eyes, but which ones?
localizations.hint_78: Observe the cards you have left.
localizations.answer_hint_0: Gregorio initiates a heaven invocation. Then trace a wind invocation.
localizations.answer_hint_3: Give these pastries (3) to Adrian (8) so he can gain strength before his training.
localizations.answer_hint_7: Adrian's score evolves as follows: 10/8/3/2/0. In order, he therefore took -2/-5/-1/-2. By looking at the score sheet (5), you can deduce Gregorio's sequence: Kick / Invocation / Punch / Kick. Indicate this sequence to Master Jansen (80) so that he gives Adrian the correct parries.
localizations.answer_hint_10: Send Adrian (8) to talk with Elorna (10).
localizations.answer_hint_18: Starting from the Jade burst (bottom), then connecting it in a straight line to the summit of the lion valley (top), to the black iguana (left) and finally to the emerald lake (right), you trace a 4.
localizations.answer_hint_56: Insert Adrian's medallion (12) into the book cover (56).
localizations.answer_hint_63: Taking the first letter of each onomatopoeia in order, you can read SEVEN (SEPT in French).
localizations.answer_hint_78: The 3rd eye refers to the back of Card O, which forms a 3rd eye between the two closed eyes.
localizations.machine_80: Adrian shows Master Jansen the sequence from Gregorio that he would like to counter.
localizations.machine_45_part1_title_1:
The most important thing
is defense.
localizations.machine_45_part1_hint: A good guard consists of raising the hands vertically, at face level, to protect the upper body.
localizations.machine_45_part1_answer: Hold your device vertically until Adrian's hands completely cover the screen.
localizations.machine_45_part2_hint: Elorna is waiting for Adrian to perform the sequence that Master Jansen had him work on at the school.
localizations.machine_45_part2_answer: Observe Adrian's school card (11): you will identify the sequence Kick/Punch/Punch/Knee/Punch. Press the zones that correspond respectively to this sequence. Then combine the result (+21) with Elorna (42). Take card 63.
localizations.machine_80_error: That's not Gregorio's sequence. Come back to see me when you remember it.
localizations.machine_0_end1: Adrian initiates his wind invocation to counter Gregorio's invocation. Unfortunately, the latter manages to narrowly dodge this powerful attack and follows up with a series of blows, ejecting Adrian from the combat zone.
localizations.machine_0_end2: As Adrian painfully gets back up, his classmates, amazed by his performance, applaud him warmly.
localizations.machine_0_end3: Master Jansen, touched by Adrian's lightning progress, takes a few steps towards him and proudly declares: 'We'll have to find you a teammate for the tournament!'
